name: drift-detector
description: Drift Detector for Claude Code — per-turn behavioral drift scoring, live badge, and automatic correction nudges.

plugins.name: drift-detector
plugins.description: Detects when Claude drifts from your output contract (persona, format, length rules) and steers it back. Deterministic scoring engine, live statusline badge, one-shot correction nudge. Real-corpus F1=0.9973 (fp=0, n=1283). 190-session synthetic eval: 100% accuracy, FP=0. Adversarial test suite included.
